html:
2026-0380
2026-04-23ESDC, LABBudget Implementation Act, 2018, No. 2Order Fixing the 180th Day After the Day on Which this Order Is Made as the Day on Which Certain Provisions of the Budget Implementation Act, 2018, No. 2 Come into ForceOrder fixing the 180th day on which the Order is made as the day on which certain provisions of the Budget Implementation Act, 2018, No. 2 comes into force in order to ensure equal treatment for employees performing the same work, regardless of their employment status, and provide protection from unfair practices to employees including those who are temporary help agency employees.N/A
subject: Order Fixing the 180th Day After the Day on Which this Order Is Made as the Day on Which Certain Provisions of the Budget Implementation Act, 2018, No. 2 Come into Force
precis: Order fixing the 180th day on which the Order is made as the day on which certain provisions of the Budget Implementation Act, 2018, No. 2 comes into force in order to ensure equal treatment for employees performing the same work, regardless of their employment status, and provide protection from unfair practices to employees including those who are temporary help agency employees.
